title: Digital Storage Detection Dogs: A Promising New Niche
abstract: Digital Storage Detection Dogs: A Promising New Niche is a RAG system that turns your documents into an interactive knowledge base. Upload files, ask questions, get answers with source citations. S...
abstract_zh: “数字存储检测犬：有前途的新宠儿”可不是一般的工具，它能把你堆积如山的文档变成一个互动的知识宝库！上传文件，提问，答案秒回还有出处。就像真狗一样灵敏，但不用每天遛弯，省时省力还高效！
